delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and (Amt1 = 0 or Amt2 = 0)
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and CC = '1CBA000007' and not ProdCode = 'CHGBACK'

insert into TransX (KeyID, GL, Contract, ProdCode,CC, Amt1, Amt2,PK) (Select KeyID, GL, Contract, ProdCode,CC, round(sum(coalesce(Amt1,0)),2) as Amt1, round(sum(coalesce(Amt2,0)),2) as Amt2,   '' as PK from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' group by KeyID, GL, Contract, ProdCode,CC)
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and PK is NULL
insert into TransX (KeyID,GL,Co,CC,Contract,ProdCode,Amt1,Amt2) (select KeyID + '-data2',GL,'2006' as Co,CC,Contract,ProdCode,Amt1,Amt2 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]')
Update TransX set KeyID = '[batchID]-save' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and ProdCode = 'CHGBACK'

insert into TransX (KeyID,GL,CC,Contract,ProdCode,Amt1,Amt2,Amt3) (select KeyID,GL,'1CBA000007' as CC,'1CBA000006' as Contract,'CHGBACK' as ProdCode,-Amt1,-Amt1,-Amt2 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]')
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and PK = ''
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Amt1 = 0 and Amt2 = 0 and Amt3 = 0
Update TransX set KeyID = '[batchID]', PK = NULL, Amt1 = -Amt1, Amt2 = -Amt1, Amt3 = -Amt2 where KeyID = '[batchID]-save'

insert into TransX (KeyID,GL,CC,Contract,ProdCode,Amt1, Amt2, Amt3,PK) (Select KeyID, GL, CC, Contract, ProdCode, round(sum(Amt1),2) as Amt1, round(sum(Amt2),2) as Amt2, round(sum(Amt3),2) as Amt3, '99' as PK from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' group by KeyID,GL,CC,Contract,ProdCode )
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and PK is NULL
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Amt1 = 0 and Amt2 = 0 and Amt3 = 0
Update TransX set TP = '', PC = '' where KeyID = '[batchID]'

insert into TransX (KeyID, GL, Amt1, Amt2, Amt3,CC,PC,TP,Contract,ProdCode,PK) (Select KeyID, '1998900' as GL, round(-sum(Amt1),2) as Amt1, round(-sum(Amt2),2) as Amt2,  round(-sum(Amt3),2) as Amt3,'' as CC,'1600000000' as PC, 'F0085' as TP,'1CBA000006' as Contract,'' as ProdCode, '99' as PK from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and ProdCode = 'CHGBACK' group by KeyID)

insert into TransX (KeyID, GL, PC, CC, Contract, ProdCode, TP, Amt1, Amt2, Amt3,PK) (Select KeyID,GL, PC, CC, Contract, ProdCode, TP, (case when Amt1 > 0 then Amt1 else 0 end) as Amt1, (case when Amt2 > 0 then Amt2 else 0 end) as Amt2, (case when Amt3 > 0 then Amt3 else 0 end) as Amt3, '40' as PK from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and not PK = '40')

insert into TransX (KeyID, GL, PC, CC, Contract, ProdCode, TP,Amt1, Amt2, Amt3,PK) (Select KeyID,GL, PC, CC, Contract, ProdCode, TP, (case when Amt1 < 0 then Amt1 else 0 end) as Amt1, (case when Amt2 < 0 then Amt2 else 0 end) as Amt2, (case when Amt3 < 0 then Amt3 else 0 end) as Amt3, '50' as PK from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and not PK = '40')
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and not PK in ('40','50')
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Amt1 = 0 and Amt2 = 0 and Amt3 = 0
update x set x.GLdesc = y.Descr from TransX x inner join COA y on x.GL = y.GL where KeyID like '[batchID]%'
update TransX set Txt = 'FFX LatAm Chargeback for [Yr]/[Mo]' where KeyID = '[batchID]'
